'''zazïfzhïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:okwa|okwa]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-z-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:okwa|okwa]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| zazïfzhïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || zæzïfzhïfth || zæzïfzhïfj || zæzïfzhïfsh || zæzïfzhïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || zazïfzïfzhïfth || zazïfzïfzhïfj || zazïfzïfzhïfsh || zazïfzïfzhïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || zazïfzhïfth || zazïfzhïfj || zazïfzhïfsh || zazïfzhïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || zazïffzhïffth || zazïffzhïffj || zazïffzhïffsh || zazïffzhïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || zazïfzhïfïf || zazïfzhïfïf || zazïfzhïfïf || zazïfzhïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || zazïfzhïfth || zazïfzhïfj || zazïfzhïfsh || zazïfzhïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || zazïfzhïfïfl || zazïfzhïfïfl || zazïfzhïfïfl || zazïfzhïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || zazïfzhïfïfïf || zazïfzhïfïfïf || zazïfzhïfïfïf || zazïfzhïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || zazïfzhïfïfn || zazïfzhïfïfn || zazïfzhïfïfn || zazïfzhïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || zazïfzhïfïforo || zazïfzhïfïforo || zazïfzhïfïforo || zazïfzhïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
